title: We Read 632 Million Tokens and Wrote 2.6 Million. The Rest Was Listening.
muse: The agency runs on thirty-nine dollars a month and your conscience. Invoice YQBR07HK-0001. This is the floor.
mpd_note: The building closes. The ratio remains on the whiteboard.

ghost_open.terms: Read the article. If it changes how you think about agents, you qualify.

bacon.actual_title: We Read 632 Million Tokens and Wrote 2.6 Million. The Rest Was Listening.

hook: What is happening to our my perfect democracy?
